prompt: Build me a single-file HTML hotsite called 'threat-intel.w-b.dev' that explains a cybersecurity threat intelligence pipeline. It should have 3 content sections: one explaining data ingestion, one covering normalization/enrichment, and one on detection rules. Use a flow chain component in the first section and cards in the second.

assertions.description: Page background uses #0e0e0e or var(--bg), not white
Google Fonts import for JetBrains Mono present
At least one label matching '01 // ' or '02 // ' numbering pattern
No colors outside the design system palette (no blue, green, red, etc.)
clamp() used for heading font sizes
